---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.content-wrap .container-narrow}
My research has been supported by multiple projects related to composite durability, manufacturing, and mechanical performance evaluation.

## Selected Projects

### Mechanical Performance of Composite Structures in Seawater Environments
*Zhejiang University Fundamental Research Funds, 2021–2024*  
**Role:** Major participant

This project focused on failure mechanisms and damage evolution of composite structures in marine environments. My work involved hygrothermal aging experiments, finite element simulation, service-life prediction, and layup optimization for CFRP structures under seawater exposure.

### Automated Placement Technology and Equipment for High-Performance Composites
*Zhejiang Provincial Science and Technology Project, 2021–2023*  
**Role:** Major participant

This project investigated the mechanical evaluation of automated fiber-placed CFRP components. My work focused on the effects of processing parameters such as temperature, pressure, and speed on porosity and mechanical behavior.

### Integrated Manufacturing Technology for Large Composite Pressure Hull Sections
*GF Science and Technology Innovation Project, 2020–2022*  
**Role:** Major participant

This project addressed large-thickness composite laminates and pressure-bearing structures. My contributions included experimental design, testing platform development, hydrostatic testing participation, and Abaqus-based analysis of thickness-dependent compressive failure.

### Rapid Manufacturing Technology for Three-Dimensional Reinforced Composites
*GF Science and Technology Innovation Project, 2019–2021*  
**Role:** Major participant

This project focused on the preparation and evaluation of Z-pinned composite structures. I participated in the fabrication of carbon Z-pins and the investigation of their mechanical behavior and failure mechanisms under marine environments.
:::
